items.name: Auto-Resubmit
items.description: 🚀 Automated & lossless LaTeX paper migration tool. Instantly convert your Overleaf source between top-tier AI conference templates (NeurIPS, ICLR, ACL等). 一键无损转换顶会论文格式！解决转投时的排版折磨，完美保留公式、图表与引用，让科研人员专注研究而非排版。
